name: Curry Salmon with Mango

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Set oven to 400°F or 200°C. Use aluminum foil to line cookie sheet.
Put the salmon in cookie sheet and cover salmon with the foil. Crumple the
Bake for approximately about 15 minutes until fish flakes easily using fork.
Meanwhile, combine curry powder, avocado oil and salt in a small bowl.
Pour dressing over the salmon and top with red onion, serrano pepper and
diced mango. Before serving, squeeze lime and sprinkle cilantro on top.
